LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CRANA WINDOWS & DOORS' APPLICATION FOR A RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND WRIT OF ATTACHMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT JUDITH THOMPSON IS IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICED. MCLAUGHLIN HAS FAILED TO ESTABLISH THE PROBABLE VALIDITY OF ANY OF ITS CONTRACT CLAIMS AGAINST MS. THOMPSON SINCE IT HAS NOT SHOWN THAT MS. THOMPSON ENTERED INTO ANY CONTRACT WITH MCLAUGHLIN OR THAT MS. THOMPSON IS THE ALTER EGO OF AND THUS LIABLE FOR THE DEBTS OF TBI. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR# 8600 =302/HK

Off Calendar Aug-14-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. Janet M. Brayer, Tel. No. 1-415-445-9555 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. Deborah Goodman of Anderson & Poole, P>C, Tel. No. 1-415-956-6413
appearing for the Defendant Judith A. Thompson.



RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Crana Windows & Doors' application for a right to attach order and writ of attachment against defendant Thompson Brooks Inc. is off calendar. The automatic bankruptcy precludes this court from ruling on the application as to TBI. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Writ Of Attachment Thompson Brooks
Off Calendar Aug-14-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Janet M. Brayer, Tel. No. 1-415-445-9555 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. Deborah Goodman of Anderson & Poole, P>C, Tel. No. 1-415-956-6413
appearing for the Defendant Judith A. Thompson.

RULING - The matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Crana Windows & Doors' application for a right to attach order and writ of attachment against defendant Judith Thompson is is denied without prejudiced. McLaughlin has failed to establish the probable validity of any of its contract claims against Ms. Thompson since it has not shown that Ms. Thompson entered into any contract with McLaughlin or that Ms. Thompson is the alter ego of and thus liable for the debts of TBI. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk
